meta_title: Website for Designer — Portfolio in 5 Minutes | Promto
meta_description: Create a designer website with AI in 5 minutes. Showcase case studies, attract clients. Professional design without code. For graphic and web designers.
og_description: AI will create a designer website in 5 minutes: case studies, portfolio, inquiry form. No code or agency needed.
hero_subtitle: Describe your projects — AI will create a portfolio site that impresses clients.
hero_placeholder: Describe what website you need for your business...

advantages.title: Case Study Showcase
advantages.description: Present projects in professional format: before/after, task description, process, and result.

advantages.title: Created in 5 Minutes
advantages.description: Describe your specialization — AI will select the structure and design optimal for a designer's portfolio.

advantages.title: Looks Premium
advantages.description: Minimalist professional design that speaks of taste and experience without extra words.

advantages.title: Attracts Clients
advantages.description: Built-in contact forms and clear CTAs convert visitors into real customers.

advantages.title: SEO & Visibility
advantages.description: Site is optimized for search engines — you'll be found by queries like "logo designer", "graphic designer", and others.

advantages.title: Easy Updates
advantages.description: Finished a new project — add it to the site in a couple minutes with no additional costs.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Specialization
how_it_works.description: Tell what you do: logos, web design, brand identity, illustrations, motion design.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates the Site
how_it_works.description: System generates a site with case study gallery, services section, pricing, and contact form.

how_it_works.title: Add Case Studies
how_it_works.description: Upload project images and describe the tasks — show clients how you think.

how_it_works.title: Publish
how_it_works.description: Share the site link on social media, Behance, and in correspondence with clients.

faq.question: Is the site suitable for graphic designers and web designers?
faq.answer: Yes. AI adapts the structure and presentation to your specialization: logos, web design, branding, packaging, illustrations, and other directions.

faq.question: How should I format case studies on a designer's website?
faq.answer: Promto generates case study structure: task description, work process, result, and metrics. You supplement with your images and details.

faq.question: Can I include pricing for designer services?
faq.answer: Yes. Add a section with service packages and prices — this saves time on correspondence and attracts clients with the right budget.

faq.question: Can I link the site to Behance or Dribbble?
faq.answer: Yes. You can add links to external platforms right on the site so clients can see all your work.

faq.question: What is Promto?
faq.answer: Promto is an AI website builder that creates a ready site from a text description in minutes. No code needed.

faq.question: How much does a designer website cost on Promto?
faq.answer: You can create a site for free. Paid plans add custom domain, analytics, and additional customization options.

cta_mid_subtitle: Create a designer website in 5 minutes and attract new clients.
cta_final_subtitle: AI will create a professional site with case studies. Free, no code.
